<!-- Erstellt mit dem Prompt von https://ai-leonidas.ch/llms-txt -->

# Hikebeast

> Hikebeast is a Swiss brand by photographer and filmmaker Leon Helg.
> It sells guides, filters and color grades for people who shoot,
> hike or wildcamp in the Swiss Alps.

The flagship is Swiss Hidden Gems, a guide to 100+ Swiss locations with GPS, season notes and wildcamping legality. A free 15-spot PDF sample is available by email opt-in. The site is English at the root and German under `/de/`. Every page linked here is also available as plain Markdown at `<url>.md`. Legal entity: Saftladen GmbH, Rotkreuz, Switzerland.

## Products

- [Swiss Hidden Gems, free sample](https://hikebeast.ch/free.md): Email opt-in for a 15-spot PDF, delivered instantly. No account.
- [Swiss Hidden Gems, full guide](https://whop.com/gorped/hidden-gems-switzerland-e8/): Paid guide on Whop. 49 USD, lifetime access. 100+ locations with GPS, best season, and wildcamping legality per spot.

## Pages

- [Home](https://hikebeast.ch/index.md): Overview of Hikebeast products and entry point to the free sample.
- [Free sample landing](https://hikebeast.ch/free.md): Product page for Swiss Hidden Gems with reviews, FAQ and email opt-in.
- [Imprint](https://hikebeast.ch/imprint.md): Legal entity Saftladen GmbH, Birkenstrasse 47, 6343 Rotkreuz, Switzerland. Contact: office@gorped.com.
- [Privacy policy](https://hikebeast.ch/privacy.md): How Hikebeast collects and handles personal data.

## German mirror

- [Startseite](https://hikebeast.ch/de/index.md): Deutsche Version der Startseite.
- [Gratis-Sample](https://hikebeast.ch/de/free.md): Deutsche Landing Page mit demselben E-Mail-Opt-in.
- [Impressum](https://hikebeast.ch/de/imprint.md): Impressum auf Deutsch.
- [Datenschutz](https://hikebeast.ch/de/privacy.md): Datenschutzerklärung auf Deutsch.

## Optional

- [Full text bundle](https://hikebeast.ch/llms-full.txt): All pages above concatenated into a single Markdown file for LLMs that prefer one fetch.
- [Readers community](https://whop.com/gorped/free-version-switzerland-hidden-gems/): Free Whop community where buyers and sample subscribers share spots and seasonal tips.
- [Author on Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/hikebeast/): Photo and video feed that drives readers to the guide.
